title: versioning — permissions
description: Two guards. sanctum-guard permissions are minimal (read-only tenant catalog). platform_admin-guard permissions gate all mutations.

permissions.name: versioning.viewAny
permissions.description: Read the tenant catalog of released + deprecated versions.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.viewAny
permissions.description: See all versions including drafts + sunsets.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.update
permissions.description: Edit metadata on an existing version (name / description / migration URL).

permissions.name: platform.versioning.delete
permissions.description: Hard-delete a draft. Refused for non-draft states.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.release
permissions.description: Draft → released transition. Publishes to public catalog.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.deprecate
permissions.description: Released → deprecated transition. Sets sunset_at + starts RFC 8594 emission.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.sunset
permissions.description: Deprecated → sunset transition. Triggers subscription auto-upgrade + final notice.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.notices.update
permissions.description: Edit a draft notice. Published notices refused unless super_admin.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.notices.publish
permissions.description: Publish a draft notice. Dispatches customer notifications when notify_customers=true.

permissions.name: platform.versioning.notices.delete
permissions.description: Delete a draft notice. Published notices refused unless super_admin.
